info.name: GraphQL – Jobs Module
info.description: Tkdjob scheduler via root `jobs`. Queries: `job(jobId)`, `jobs(limit, offset, status, jobType)` → `JobConnection` with `pageInfo { total limit offset hasNext hasPrevious }`. On `SchedulerJob` request `statusPayload`, `timelinePayload`, `dagPayload` for live Tkdjob data. Mutations return `SchedulerJob` (`id`, `jobId`, `userId`, `jobType`, `status`, …). `retryJob` returns JSON (Tkdjob response), not a job object. `createContact360Import` and `createEmailPatternImport` require SuperAdmin. `CreateContact360ImportInput` requires `s3Bucket` + `s3Key`. Env: `{{jobUuid}}`, `{{s3Bucket}}`, `{{fileKey}}`. See `contact360.io/api` `app/graphql/modules/jobs/`.

body.raw: {"query":"query GetJob($jobId: ID!) { jobs { job(jobId: $jobId) { id jobId userId jobType status requestPayload responsePayload statusPayload createdAt updatedAt timelinePayload dagPayload } } }","variables":{"jobId":"{{jobUuid}}"}}

request.description: Single scheduler job by Tkdjob uuid. `statusPayload`/`timelinePayload`/`dagPayload` hit Tkdjob when reachable.

body.raw: {"query":"query ListJobs($limit: Int, $offset: Int, $status: String, $jobType: String) { jobs { jobs(limit: $limit, offset: $offset, status: $status, jobType: $jobType) { jobs { id jobId jobType status createdAt } pageInfo { total limit offset hasNext hasPrevious } } } }","variables":{"limit":25,"offset":0,"status":null,"jobType":null}}

{"query":"mutation CreateEmailFinderExport($input: CreateEmailFinderExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailFinderExport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","inputCsvKey":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"exports/email-finder/","rowLimit":100,"chunkSize":10,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

request.description: `inputCsvKey` = fileKey from Upload module after completeUpload.

body.raw: {"query":"mutation CreateEmailVerifyExport($input: CreateEmailVerifyExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailVerifyExport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","inputCsvKey":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"exports/email-verify/","rowLimit":100,"chunkSize":10,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateEmailPatternImport($input: CreateEmailPatternImportInput!) { jobs { createEmailPatternImport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","inputCsvKey":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"imports/patterns/","chunkCount":8,"companyUuid":"{{companyUuid}}","batchSize":50,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateContact360Export($input: CreateContact360ExportInput!) { jobs { createContact360Export(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"outputPrefix":"exports/contact360/","service":"contact","vql":{"where":{},"selectColumns":["first_name","last_name","email"],"limit":1000},"sliceCount":4,"pageSize":1000,"retryCount":2,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateContact360Import($input: CreateContact360ImportInput!) { jobs { createContact360Import(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","s3Key":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"imports/contact360/","chunkCount":8,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateAppointmentImport($input: CreateAppointmentImportInput!) { jobs { createAppointmentImport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Key":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"appointments/imports/","s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","chunkCount":8,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

request.description: Returns scalar JSON (Tkdjob response). Do not select subfields.
